title: 9 Initiating ATM and POS Trace Requests
body_text:
9	Initiating ATM and POS Trace Requests
9.1	Initiating an ATM Trace Request
Trace requests for ATM transactions are handled as follows:
If the transaction was conducted on THE EXCHANGE
ГӮВ®
network, the trace is handled directly between the acquirer and issuer. This applies regardless of whether your switch provider is Cardtronics or Everlink. See the Canadian Exchange Network Operating Rules for details.
If your switch provider is Cardtronics and the transaction wasnГўВҖВҷt conducted on THE EXCHANGE network, send the trace request directly to Cardtronics.
If your switch provider is Everlink and the transaction wasnГўВҖВҷt conducted on THE EXCHANGE network, complete the ATM Trace Request on ServiceNow. Central 1 will forward the trace request to the appropriate party.
To submit an ATM trace request on ServiceNow:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login

Applications
, then select

. See Figure 2.

ServiceNow

Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow

Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.

. See Figure 5.

9.2	Initiating a POS Trace Request
Trace requests for POS transactions are handled as follows:
If the transaction was conducted on THE EXCHANGE network, the trace is handled directly between the acquirer and issuer. This applies regardless of whether your switch provider is Cardtronics or Everlink. See the Canadian Exchange Network Operating Rules for details.
If your switch provider is Cardtronics and the transaction wasnГўВҖВҷt conducted on THE EXCHANGE network, send the trace request directly to Cardtronics.
If your switch provider is Everlink and the transaction wasnГўВҖВҷt conducted on THE EXCHANGE network, complete the POS Trace Request on ServiceNow. Central 1 will forward the trace request to the appropriate party.
Complete a POS Trace Request on ServiceNow for unresolved transactions such as:
Multiple transactions posted to the cardholderГўВҖВҷs account, but there is only one cardholder record.
The transaction is posted to the cardholderГўВҖВҷs account but was declined at the time of purchase.
The cardholder has no record of the transaction.
When resolution of a discrepancy requires a transaction to be traced to source, Central 1 will forward a copy of the POS Trace Request to the acquiring financial institution. Adjustments will be processed individually to your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Central 1 current account upon receipt.
Note:
Interac
ГӮВ®
doesnГўВҖВҷt process customer-initiated trace requests for differences of $20.00 or less, unless itГўВҖВҷs a duplicate transaction. Financial institutions can choose to provide customers with adjustments of $20.00 or less and absorb the loss.
To submit a POS trace request on ServiceNow:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 7.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 7: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
, then select
Production Applications
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 9.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 9: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
in the Navigation Menu.
Select the
Electronic Payments
category, then select
POS Trace Request
. See Figure 10.

9.3	Submitting a Manual POS or ATM Trace Request
If ServiceNow is unavailable, submit a manual trace request.
Complete the POS or ATM Trace Request, Form 2465. Central 1 will only accept manual submission of the form if ServiceNow is unavailable. Completion of the form is self-explanatory. See Figure 12.
Figure 12: POS or ATM Trace Request, Form 2465
Related Information
POS/ATM Trace Request,
Form 2465
9.4	Non-Financial Responses to POS Trace Requests
The C2C Node conveys responses to trace requests directly to your financial institution.
The Cooperative Node provides Central 1 with non-financial responses to trace requests. Central 1 conveys this information to your financial institution through a ticket in ServiceNow.
9.5	Failure to Respond to a POS Trace Request
Interac
regulations stipulate that a financial institution must respond within 30 calendar days of receiving a POS trace request. If a response isnГўВҖВҷt forthcoming within the specified time frame, the requesting financial institution can contact Central 1 via the existing POS Trace Request ticket in ServiceNow. If necessary, Central 1 will follow up on overdue POS trace requests on behalf of your financial institution.
9.6	Failure to Respond to an ATM Trace Request
Interac
regulations stipulate that a financial institution must respond to ATM trace requests within ten business days.
If you submit an ATM Trace Request and donГўВҖВҷt receive a response within ten business days, contact Central 1 via the existing ATM Trace Request ticket in ServiceNow. If necessary, Central 1 will follow up on overdue ATM trace requests on behalf of your financial institution.
9.7	ATM and POS Dispute Resolution
If a transaction dispute between an issuer and an acquirer canГўВҖВҷt be resolved independently through the Request for Information and/or the adjustment process, refer to the applicable operating rules/regulations for the dispute resolution process:
Canadian Exchange Network Operating Rules
ACCULINK ATM Operating Policies and Procedures
Cirrus Worldwide Bylaws
Visa Core Rules and Visa Product and Service Rules
